metadata.title: RescueLink — Emergency Coordination
metadata.description: Offline-first platform for humanitarian coordination during natural disasters.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

sync.offlineBanner: You are offline. Records are saved on your device and sync automatically when Internet returns.
sync.savedLocally: Saved on your device. It will sync when connection is available.
sync.localOnly: On this device only — pending server sync

home.heroTitle: Find and coordinate help when it matters most
home.heroSubtitle: Multi-country platform to locate people, coordinate shelters, and centralize resources — even without Internet.
home.modulesSubtitle: Tools designed for citizens, rescuers, and humanitarian organizations.

missingPersons.title: Missing persons
missingPersons.description: Register and search for missing people during an emergency.

foundPersons.title: Found persons
foundPersons.description: Authorized registry of findings with unique codes.

humanitarian.title: Humanitarian hub
humanitarian.description: Logistics and resource coordination for NGOs.

missingPersons.title: Missing persons
missingPersons.subtitle: Register or search for information to help reunite families.
missingPersons.scopeNote: Only for reporting missing persons. If you found someone, a separate module is coming soon.
missingPersons.empty: No records yet. Be the first to report.
missingPersons.registerSuccess: Report received for {name}. The information is now available to search teams.
missingPersons.registerSuccessOffline: Report saved for {name}. It will publish automatically when Internet returns.
missingPersons.alreadyRegistered: {name} is already registered with the same details. Check the list below.
missingPersons.contactInvalid: Invalid phone number. Use 7 to 15 digits.
missingPersons.howItWorks: 1. Fill in the details · 2. We save the report · 3. Families and rescuers can search here
